default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss sales pipeline management and onboarding processes for fwd.digital's rapidly growing client base.](https://fathom.video/share/NXJHogprmhy44xc2oesycDPLYgL72Smc?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital is experiencing high demand, with 7 kickoffs scheduled for January (vs. 4 planned)](https://fathom.video/share/NXJHogprmhy44xc2oesycDPLYgL72Smc?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [Current focus: secure signatures through end of January, book 6-8 weeks ahead to improve capacity planning](https://fathom.video/share/NXJHogprmhy44xc2oesycDPLYgL72Smc?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
  - [Team is still ramping up; need to standardize processes for consistent, high-quality client onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/NXJHogprmhy44xc2oesycDPLYgL72Smc?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [Considering implementation of a waitlist/reservation system to manage growing demand](https://fathom.video/share/NXJHogprmhy44xc2oesycDPLYgL72Smc?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)

## Topics

### Current Sales Pipeline Status

  - [Multiple high-value clients in various stages of closing:](https://fathom.video/share/NXJHogprmhy44xc2oesycDPLYgL72Smc?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Jason's company (80M/year revenue) signed, kickoff set for Jan 20](https://fathom.video/share/NXJHogprmhy44xc2oesycDPLYgL72Smc?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
      - [Koala (recent $16M raise) likely to sign soon](https://fathom.video/share/NXJHogprmhy44xc2oesycDPLYgL72Smc?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
      - [Zooplue follow-up in progress, potential signing by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/NXJHogprmhy44xc2oesycDPLYgL72Smc?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Using Airtable for CRM, but current setup needs optimization](https://fathom.video/share/NXJHogprmhy44xc2oesycDPLYgL72Smc?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
  - [646 untouched leads from webinars, representing significant potential](https://fathom.video/share/NXJHogprmhy44xc2oesycDPLYgL72Smc?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)

### Client Onboarding Challenges

  - [Team members (Jess, Mariana, Vivek, Ada) still ramping up on processes](https://fathom.video/share/NXJHogprmhy44xc2oesycDPLYgL72Smc?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [Need for standardized workflows and documentation](https://fathom.video/share/NXJHogprmhy44xc2oesycDPLYgL72Smc?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
  - [Kickoff dates serving as effective contract dates, aiming for 2-month advance signings](https://fathom.video/share/NXJHogprmhy44xc2oesycDPLYgL72Smc?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)

### Process Improvement Ideas

  - [Create a new "Next Steps" field in CRM for better tracking](https://fathom.video/share/NXJHogprmhy44xc2oesycDPLYgL72Smc?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Implement a 5-question qualification process for leads](https://fathom.video/share/NXJHogprmhy44xc2oesycDPLYgL72Smc?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)
  - [Develop a structured follow-up system post-calls (e.g., "Here are two available dates...")](https://fathom.video/share/NXJHogprmhy44xc2oesycDPLYgL72Smc?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Consider a reservation system with a deposit (e.g., $10k) to manage demand](https://fathom.video/share/NXJHogprmhy44xc2oesycDPLYgL72Smc?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)

### Capacity Planning

  - [Current goal: Book 6 weeks ahead, then extend to 2 months](https://fathom.video/share/NXJHogprmhy44xc2oesycDPLYgL72Smc?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [Fundraising planned for January to support faster capacity building](https://fathom.video/share/NXJHogprmhy44xc2oesycDPLYgL72Smc?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [Need to assess how many team members can execute at Marcel's level](https://fathom.video/share/NXJHogprmhy44xc2oesycDPLYgL72Smc?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sort and prioritize deals in pipeline, aiming to secure signatures through end of January](https://fathom.video/share/NXJHogprmhy44xc2oesycDPLYgL72Smc?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
  - [Create and implement the "Next Steps" field in Airtable CRM](https://fathom.video/share/NXJHogprmhy44xc2oesycDPLYgL72Smc?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
  - [Develop a standardized 5-question qualification process for leads](https://fathom.video/share/NXJHogprmhy44xc2oesycDPLYgL72Smc?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)
  - [Design a structured follow-up system for post-call communications](https://fathom.video/share/NXJHogprmhy44xc2oesycDPLYgL72Smc?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Evaluate feasibility of implementing a waitlist/reservation system with deposits](https://fathom.video/share/NXJHogprmhy44xc2oesycDPLYgL72Smc?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)

action_items.description: Create new "Next Steps" field in CRM for easier tracking and reporting
Draft 5-10 key qualifying questions for lead follow-up process
Sort through current deals, prioritize for signatures by 2nd week of Jan to book through Feb
Send out proposals to potential clients in pipeline
Develop process for managing bookings, incl. 30-min call structure and follow-up email template
